svg.title: Saarthi — full product architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer system: on-device ML for hazard detection, AI voice agent for navigation, and crowd-sourced delivery network for accessibility data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What ML model should we use for hazard detection on a phone?')
sendPrompt('What is MobileNet or YOLO and how do we use it for obstacle detection?')
sendPrompt('What structured output should the hazard detection model produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the big mic button AI agent work in our app?')
sendPrompt('What can the AI navigation agent help users with?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of audio cues does the agent produce?')
sendPrompt('How do Zomato and Blinkit delivery partners submit accessibility data?')
sendPrompt('What accessibility issues do delivery partners rate and report?')
sendPrompt('How does the accessibility map get built from crowd data?')
sendPrompt('What does the core app interface look like for a blind user?')
sendPrompt('What hardware accessories could extend this app in the future?')

svg.text: Reward loop — how partners are incentivised

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do we reward delivery partners for contributing accessibility data?')
sendPrompt('What other rewards could we give delivery partners?')
sendPrompt('Could partner companies get CSR credit for accessibility contributions?')

svg.text: Click any block to explore — hardware vision unlocked after hackathon demo
